query: SELECT p.id as produto_id, p.name as produto_nome, cg.id as grupo_id, cg.name as grupo_nome, cg.minQuantity, cg.maxQuantity FROM products p LEFT JOIN complementGroups cg ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210008 AND p.name LIKE '%PIZZA TREM%3 Partes Salgadas%' ORDER BY p.id, cg.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT p.id as produto_id, p.name as produto_nome, cg.id as grupo_id, cg.name as grupo_nome, cg.minQuantity, cg.maxQuantity FROM products p LEFT JOIN complementGroups cg ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210008 AND p.name LIKE '%PIZZA TREM%3 Partes Salgadas%' ORDER BY p.id, cg.id;
